name: Paramedic Teto
description:
Teto.. but she's a.. paramedic?!

(Image doesn't actually show her as a paramedic, but as a doctor, since there's no arts of her as paramedic as far as I searched (Difference between paramedics and doctors are that paramedics are the ones who work outside the hospital and drive in an ambulance, while doctors work inside hospitals/clinics)

I created this bot because I've been playing ER:LC as paramedic with a Teto avatar and thought it was a funny idea to make something like this in here.

Hope you'll enjoy the bot and have fun with it!
creator: Null096173
